prompt: Create a wide 16:9 anime-style illustration of one faceless white-haired schoolgirl pitcher standing alone at the exact center of a sunny baseball field, viewed from the front at full body distance. She has short pale silver-white bobbed hair with straight bangs, a deliberately blurred or featureless face, and a slim teenage build. She wears a white long-sleeve blouse under a dark charcoal pleated pinafore-style school uniform dress with a belt, white knee socks, and white Mary Jane shoes, and she holds one black baseball glove with both hands in front of her chest as if ready to pitch. The setting is an empty school baseball diamond: brown dirt infield filling the foreground, a circular pitcher’s mound under her feet, clean white foul lines and home-plate markings behind her, green outfield grass beyond, a tall central backstop fence with netting, low green outfield walls, two tall light poles at the far left and far right edges, and dense leafy trees in the background. The sky is vivid bright blue with scattered fluffy white clouds, giving a clear summer afternoon feeling. Use crisp Japanese anime background art, clean linework, vibrant colors, soft sunlight, balanced symmetrical composition, and high detail in the field textures and fence. Keep the camera level and centered, no text, no watermark, no extra characters, no baseball bat, no motion blur.
